case_title: ANOTHER CORPORATE ISP,LLC VS. FRIENDS OF THE MISSION GREENWAY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DENNIS RUBENSTEIN FILED BY DEFENDANT FRIENDS OF THE MISSION GREENWAY
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,515.63 FILED BY ANOTHER CORPORATE ISP,LLC AS TO DEFENDANT FRIENDS OF THE MISSION GREENWAY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-2023 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-28-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-28-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY. PLAINTIFF ANOTHER CORPORATE ISP,LLC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY RUDY RUCKER (CO-OWNER). DEFENDANT FRIENDS OF THE MISSION GREENWAY IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DENNIS RUBENSTEIN (PRESIDENT). DECISIONS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION TO ALLOW THE DEFENDANT TO PROVIDE ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE BY INDIVIDUALS, WHO ACTED AT THEIR OWN INDIVIDUAL CAPACITY. SAID ADDITIONAL INFORMATION TO BE SENT BY SEPTEMBER 11, 2023 VIA MAIL TO BOTH THE PLAINTIFF AND THE COURT, AFTER RECEIVE OF THAT THE COURT WILL THEN MAKE ITS FINAL RULING. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506) ***AFTER HEARING: HONORABLE PANY LY EXTENDS THE DATE OF THE ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO BE SUBMITTED BY THE DEFENDANT NO LATER THAN SEPT 30, 2023.*** (D506).
SC-105(REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANOTHER CORPORATE ISP,LLC
ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER DENIED**

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANOTHER CORPORATE ISP,LLC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FRIENDS OF THE MISSION GREENWAY PLEASE SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-28-2023 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) RUDY RUCKER, CO-OWNER. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANOTHER CORPORATE ISP,LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $100. SERVED JUL-10-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FRIENDS OF THE MISSION GREENWAY
